class.name: vision_processing/JointGroupVelocityController
class.description: Velocity-commanded position servo with gravity-holding stale-command behavior.

class.name: vision_processing/CertifiedCbfVelocityController
class.description: Hard-real-time certified CBF brake using a gravity-holding joint-position servo. Consumes atomic GPU CBF command/certificate packets, never waits for CUDA, and integrates certified velocity with bounded position lead.
